form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation failed to finish at this track on October 25 over 1609m. Previous preparation first-up ran on from midfield and posted a big 24 m win as favourite (Fr6) at Bathurst (2:04.30) beating Californiaprincess in 2yo No NR F on September 17 at $1.05. Classy filly who can use her speed from this draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung-in under pressure in the early part of the home straight.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 2.5 m finishing fourth after showing early speed, behind Mister Quirk at Penrith over 2125m in a NR up to 70 on March 20 at $2.30. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Mcbart at this track over 1609m in a 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on March 31 at $15. Drawn nicely and capable of featuring.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track was 6th-10.01 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Baltusrol (1:52.60) in NR up to 69 on April 7 at $101. Before that 10th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track, beaten 24 m by Rivera Lou (1:52.90) in NR up to 64 on March 31 at $41. Others read better. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by 6 m (Fr5) at this track (1:51.80) beating Theres Wally in NR up to 64 on April 7 at $8 at the bell was 5th-7.63. Hard to leave out on current form. Hard to knock winning form.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr3) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track was 2nd-1.43 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Baltusrol (1:52.60) in NR up to 69 on April 7 at $5. form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 7th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 4th-6.84 beaten 8 m by Gipsy Princess (1:52.90) in NR up to 80 M on March 27 at $15. At the previous start 5th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 8th-15.7 beaten 9 m by Oakie Smokeshow (1:51.70) in NR up to 70 on March 17 at $15. Draws wide but drops in grade and will be fitter.
